text_en: I feel down-hearted and blue.
text_zh: 近期我觉得心情郁闷、情绪低沉、不开心

text_en: Morning is when I feel the best.
text_zh: 我觉得一天之中，在早晨的时候我的心情是最好的

text_en: I have crying spells or feel like it.
text_zh: 我会一阵阵哭出来或感觉很想哭

text_en: I have trouble sleeping at night.
text_zh: 我晚上睡眠不好

text_en: I eat as much as I used to.
text_zh: 我最近食量比较平均，吃的和平时一样多

text_en: I still enjoy sex.
text_zh: 我与异性亲密接触时和以往一样愉快

text_en: I notice that I am losing weight.
text_zh: 我感觉到体重有减轻

text_en: I have trouble with constipation.
text_zh: 我有便秘的苦恼

text_en: My heart beats faster than usual.
text_zh: 我感觉到心跳比平常快

text_en: I get tired for no reason.
text_zh: 我无缘无故地感到疲乏

text_en: My mind is as clear as it used to be.
text_zh: 我的头脑跟平常一样清楚

text_en: I find it easy to do the things I used to.
text_zh: 我做过去经常做的事情，不觉得有什么困难

text_en: I am restless and can't keep still.
text_zh: 我觉得不安，而且难以保持平静

text_en: I feel hopeful about the future.
text_zh: 我对未来抱有希望

text_en: I am more irritable than usual.
text_zh: 我比平常容易生气激动

text_en: I find it easy to make decisions.
text_zh: 我发现做出决定是容易的事

text_en: I feel that I am useful and needed.
text_zh: 我觉得自己是个有用的人，有人需要我

text_en: My life is pretty full.
text_zh: 我的生活过得很有意思

text_en: I feel that others would be better off if I were dead.
text_zh: 我认为如果我死了，别人会生活得好些

text_en: I still enjoy the things I used to do.
text_zh: 对平常感兴趣的事情我仍然感兴趣
